_comment: UMich-ITS Chatbot - Diagnostic Questions. Designed to work with single-word token intents + synonyms normalization.
_comment_design: Use 5 universal questions for all issues (asked first).
Then ask 2 intent-specific questions for the top intent (or top 2 if tie).
Each question stores an answer in ConversationState.answers[store_key].
If you want automatic branching later, add 'rules' per question, but keep v1 simple.

universal.text: Is this happening on just one device, or multiple devices?
universal._comment: Helps separate device-specific vs network/account-wide problems.
Northwood gets special WiFi steps; off-campus impacts VPN, Duo, and login paths.

universal.text: Which connection are you using when the problem happens?
universal._comment: If ethernet works but wifi doesn't, route to WiFi troubleshooting.
Helps decide if this is a sudden outage vs long-term configuration.

universal.text: Did anything change right before this started? (new device, password reset, update, new router, etc.)
universal._comment: Password resets often break eduroam, VPN, and some app sessions.

_comment_intent_questions: Each intent has 2 questions. Ask these after universal questions (or use them as tie-breakers).

wifi_eduroam_connectivity.text: Which network are you trying to use?
wifi_eduroam_connectivity._comment: If they pick eduroam/msetup, you can point them to profile install/renew steps.

wifi_eduroam_connectivity.text: What best describes the WiFi problem?

password_account_access.text: What are you trying to log into when it fails?
password_account_access._comment: Helps you route the fix or escalate to the right support channel.

password_account_access.text: What do you see when you try to sign in?
password_account_access._comment: Keeps it high-level; details can be asked in freeform later.

duo_okta_authentication._comment: Common paths: push delay, enrollment/new phone, or SSO loop.

duo_okta_authentication.text: How are you trying to approve the login?
duo_okta_authentication._comment: If push fails, passcode often works; this guides procedural steps.

printing_mprint_setup._comment: Separates MPrint issues vs local printer driver issues.

printing_mprint_setup.text: What’s happening with the print job?
printing_mprint_setup._comment: Queue/release problems map to PaperCut/MPrint troubleshooting.

software_installation_updates.text: Which app or update are you working on?
software_installation_updates._comment: Lets you load the right procedural steps quickly.
Activation issues are a distinct branch.

vpn_remote_access._comment: Your synonyms normalize anyconnect/secureclient; this still helps clarity.

vpn_remote_access.text: Are you trying to connect from off campus?
vpn_remote_access._comment: Off-campus is the dominant use-case and changes the expected behavior.

google_drive_dropbox_sharing.text: Which service is the issue in?
google_drive_dropbox_sharing._comment: Lets you choose the correct permission/share flow.

google_drive_dropbox_sharing.text: What best describes the access/sharing problem?
google_drive_dropbox_sharing._comment: Permission denied vs missing file are totally different procedures.

_comment_tiebreaker_policy: Optional: If top 2 intent scores are close, ask one question from each of the top 2 intents and rescore.
